tbl_description: One row per pooled regional sample: a (cruise x region) composite. Venrick CalCOFI phytoplankton are pooled across stations into 4 regions (NE/SE/Alley/Offshore; Hayward & Venrick 1998) before counting, so there is no per-station position — latitude/longitude are the region-centroid (provisional, see questions Q01).

Phytoplankton abundance in long form: one row per (sample, taxon). measurement_type = phytoplankton_abundance, measurement_value = cells/L (provisional units, Q02). Group-SUM rows from the source are derivable from taxa and excluded (Q03).
Taxon lookup keyed by the source species_code (Venrick code), with verbatim taxa group + species and a best-effort WoRMS aphia_id (partial; phytoplankton are poorly covered, Q05).
The 4 pooled regions defined on the CalCOFI grid (Hayward & Venrick 1998), with member station codes and a provisional centroid (Q01).
